metadata.title: Core Database Field Mapping for AI/LLM
metadata.description: Filtered field mappings for Lead, Customer, Lead Detail, and Split Payment tables
metadata.purpose: AI Assistance & Suggestion System - Core Tables Only

finex_lead.description: Core table representing every home loan / LAP application. Progresses through multi-stage lifecycle (New → Login → Sanctioned → Disbursed or Lost)

last_status_id.purpose: Previous status before last transition - for audit

loan_sub_type.purpose: Sub-type of loan (resale, construction) - varies by bank

credit_pending.purpose: Which team has credit hold on lead

credit_assign_to.purpose: User ID of credit team member assigned

credit_approval_required.purpose: Whether credit approval required before login

followup_status.purpose: Whether followup is pending or completed

rm_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Relationship Manager (External SFA ID)
rm_id.note: NOT finex_user.id - external SFA system ID

cbm_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Consulting Business Manager (External SFA ID)

abm_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Area Business Manager (External SFA ID)

sbm_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - City Business Manager (External SFA ID)

rh_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Regional Head (External SFA ID)

zh_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Zonal Head (External SFA ID)

nh_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - National Head (External SFA ID)

sh_id.purpose: Sales hierarchy - Sales Head (External SFA ID)

reject_reason_id.purpose: Reason category for lead rejection (when status_id=5)

lost_date.purpose: Date when lead was marked as lost

checklist_id.purpose: Current checklist stage for document collection

first_call_data.purpose: Timestamp of first call made to customer

is_correct_data.purpose: Quality flag - data validated as correct

is_demo.purpose: Whether this is a test/demo lead

is_revisit.purpose: Whether this is a revisit/returning customer

docs_collected.purpose: Comma-separated list of document type IDs (e.g., '1,2,3')

finex_lead_detail.description: Detailed loan request specifics - loan amount, tenure, property details, employment info, milestone dates. 1:1 relationship with finex_lead

no_of_emi.purpose: Number of remaining EMI months on existing loans

time_in_current_co.purpose: Months customer has worked at current company

In_Account_Turnover_2cr.purpose: Account turnover >= 2 Crores in last 12 months

is_property_identified.purpose: Whether property has been identified/under agreement

is_expected_registration_date.purpose: Whether expected_registration_date is estimated or confirmed

builder_name_id.purpose: Builder/developer ID if property in builder project

project_name.purpose: Project ID if property in builder project

login_date.purpose: Date when bank issued login number

login_date_marked.purpose: System marker when lead marked as Login

sanction_date_marked.purpose: System marker when lead marked as Sanctioned

offer_share_date.purpose: Date when offer shared with customer

finex_customer.description: Primary applicant/borrower personal, contact, KYC, and qualification details. Created when lead transitions to login stage

pa_sameas_cra.purpose: Permanent address same as current residential

is_bulk_upload.purpose: Flag if customer added via bulk upload

finex_split_payment.description: Tranche-wise disbursement tracking. One lead can have multiple split payments for multi-tranche disbursals

finex_customer_co_applicant.description: Co-applicant/co-borrower personal, contact, employment, and KYC details. One lead can have multiple co-applicants (spouse, parent, etc.). Used for joint liability assessment and additional income qualification.

ca_pan_linked_mobile.purpose: Mobile number linked to co-applicant PAN

ca_cra_house_number.purpose: Co-applicant current residential address house number

ca_pa_sameas_cra.purpose: Flag if permanent address same as current residential address

ca_duration_of_stay.purpose: Years of residence at current address

ca_company_type.purpose: Type of company for employment classification

ca_no_of_emi.purpose: Number of existing EMIs for co-applicant

ca_is_form_16_filled.purpose: Flag if Form 16 filed by employer (Y/N)

same_as_cus_addr.purpose: Flag if address same as primary applicant

ai_usage_notes.status_based_actions: Use status_id + sub_status_id to determine AI suggestions. status=2 + sub_status=600 = Login Underwriting
ai_usage_notes.credit_workflow: credit_status + credit_pending determines team ownership and AI suggestions
ai_usage_notes.verification_bottlenecks: is_login_verified, is_sanction_verified, is_disbursal_verified show verification delays
ai_usage_notes.document_gaps: doc_status + kyc_status identify missing docs. Key: doc_id 14=Aadhaar, 15=PAN (control kyc_status)
ai_usage_notes.disbursal_tracking: tranche_type + is_pdd_verified + is_transaction_verified for disbursal AI suggestions
ai_usage_notes.pii_encrypted_fields: finex_customer: email, mobile, alt_phone, pancard_no, aadhar_no, father_name, mother_name, pa_house_number, pa_street, pa_pincode, cra_house_number, cra_street, cra_pincode; finex_customer_co_applicant: ca_email, ca_mobile, ca_annual_income, ca_father_name, ca_mother_name, ca_pancard_no, ca_aadhar_no, ca_pa_house_number, ca_pa_street
ai_usage_notes.sfa_hierarchy_ids: rm_id, cbm_id, abm_id, sbm_id, rh_id, zh_id, nh_id, sh_id are EXTERNAL SFA IDs, NOT finex_user.id
ai_usage_notes.co_applicant_joint_liability: ca_type determines if co-applicant is financially liable (financial) or reference only (non_financial). Use ca_annual_income for joint income qualification.
